string: Microphone access is required for voice dhikr counting. Audio is processed only on your device and is never recorded or stored.
Speech recognition is used to detect dhikr keywords spoken aloud. Audio data is never recorded or sent to any server.
Location is used to calculate prayer times and qibla direction. Your location is never sent to any server.
Location is used to calculate prayer times and qibla direction. Your location is never sent to any server.
